name: HLR Verified
description: High-level requirements are verified for compliance, accuracy and consistency (review/analysis).
rationale: DO-178C Table A-3: HLR are verified for compliance with system requirements, accuracy, consistency, verifiability and conformance to standards.

examples.fails: the required objective evidence is absent

source: RTCA DO-178C / EUROCAE ED-12C — Software Considerations in Airborne Systems and Equipment Certification; objectives per Annex A tables A-1 to A-10.
